title: Computational Protein Stability Analysis of SCN1A Missense Variants Identifies a Proteostasis-Impaired Pore-Region Subset and a Complementary Stability-Neutral Population
description: Methodology and analysis code for a structure-guided protein-stability study of SCN1A (Nav1.1) missense variants. The pipeline combines FoldX 5.1 (RepairPDB + BuildModel) and Rosetta Cartesian ddG (ref2015_cart), with membrane-aware RosettaMP (franklin2019), applied to an AlphaFold3-predicted full-length Nav1.1 structure (UniProt P35498). Domain-stratified analysis distinguishes a proteostasis-impaired pore-region (P-loop / selectivity-filter) subset from a complementary, stability-neutral S4 voltage-sensor subset, and compares physics-based stability with sequence-based predictors (AlphaMissense, EVE). This archive contains the analysis scripts, the AlphaFold3 input structure, representative raw FoldX/Rosetta outputs, and a reproduction guide. Full per-variant datasets and publication figures are withheld until the manuscript is accepted.
